description: Retrieve a summary of your account status in LightStock, including user tier and balances.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output includes user tier (Basic/VIP), trading balance, savings balance, and frozen margin; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: List all industry sectors available in LightStock.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a sorted list of sector names; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: List all stock tickers belonging to a specific industry sector in LightStock.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of ticker symbols in that sector; on failure (e.g., invalid sector), output contains an error message.

description: Search for stocks by ticker symbol or company name in LightStock.

query.description: The keyword to search for in ticker symbols or company names.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of matching stocks with ticker, name, and current price; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Get detailed information about a specific stock, including price, P/E ratio, market cap, and description.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output includes full stock metadata; on failure (e.g., invalid ticker), output contains an error message.

description: Authenticate the user by entering the trading password. Required before placing orders or upgrading to VIP.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms successful authentication; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Transfer funds between your trading account and savings account in LightStock.

amount.description: The amount to transfer (must be positive).

direction.description: Transfer direction: 's2t' (savings to trading) or 't2s' (trading to savings).

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the transfer; on failure (e.g., insufficient balance), output contains an error message.

description: Place a market order to buy or sell a stock at the current market price.

quantity.description: Number of shares to trade (must be positive).

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms execution with fee; on failure (e.g., market closed, insufficient funds, or daily trade limit reached), output contains an error message.

description: Place a limit order to buy or sell a stock only at a specified price or better.

limit_price.description: The limit price for the order.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms order placement and shows frozen funds; on failure (e.g., market closed, insufficient available cash), output contains an error message.

description: Place a stop-loss order to automatically sell a stock when its price falls to a specified level. (VIP-only feature)

stop_price.description: The trigger price (must be below current market price).

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the stop-loss order; on failure (e.g., not VIP, invalid price, or insufficient shares), output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve your current stock holdings (positions) in LightStock.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of positions with ticker, quantity, and average cost; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: List all active pending orders (limit or stop-loss) in your account.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of pending orders with details; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Cancel a pending order by its unique order ID and release any frozen funds.

oid.description: The unique order ID to cancel.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms cancellation; on failure (e.g., order not found), output contains an error message.

description: Retrieve a complete history of all executed trades in your account.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of past transactions with timestamp, ticker, side, price, and fee; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Add or remove a stock from your watchlist in LightStock.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol to toggle.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms whether the stock was added or removed; on failure (e.g., invalid ticker), output contains an error message.

description: Get current price and key metrics for all stocks in your watchlist.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is a list of watchlist stocks with ticker, price, and P/E ratio; on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Check the current fee required to upgrade your account to VIP status in LightStock.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is the VIP upgrade fee (in dollars); on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Upgrade your account to VIP status to unlock advanced features like short selling and unlimited day trades.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms VIP activation and deducts the fee; on failure (e.g., already VIP or insufficient funds), output contains an error message.

description: Check how many day trades you have left today. Basic users have a daily limit; VIP users have unlimited trades.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output is either a number (Basic) or 'Unlimited' (VIP); on failure, output contains an error message.

description: Set a price alert for a stock to notify you when it reaches a target price.

price.description: The target price that triggers the alert.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms the alert was set; on failure (e.g., invalid ticker), output contains an error message.

description: Remove an existing price alert for a stock.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol to remove the alert for.

returns.description: A dictionary containing status and output. On success, output confirms removal; on failure (e.g., no alert exists), output contains an error message.
